_note: When adding a new vulnerability type not already in VulnType, see docs/benchmark-management.md#updating-when-you-add-a-new-vulnerability-type for the source files that need updating.
description: Small Express workspace handoff service with redirect and cross-origin response handling.

vulnerabilities.description: The handoff service is created with a plaintext HTTP server.
A user-controlled query parameter is passed directly to res.redirect.
A route parameter is used to build a protocol-relative redirect URL.
The service reflects request origin data into Access-Control-Allow-Origin while allowing credentials.
